chunks.title: The Folly of Pleasure and Wealth
chunks.reason: A continuous monologue describing the pursuit of joy, material wealth, and their ultimate futility.

chunks.title: The Fate of Wisdom and Folly
chunks.reason: A logical reflection comparing the outcomes of wisdom versus folly and concluding with a hatred of life.

chunks.title: The Burden of Inheritance
chunks.reason: A reflection on the anxiety of leaving one's labor to an unknown successor and the pain of toil.

chunks.title: The Gift of Enjoyment
chunks.reason: A concluding argument that finding joy in labor is a divine gift, contrasting the wise and the sinner.
